remediation: Azure Container Group should have managed identity enabled
title: Beta - Container Group Managed Identity Disabled

remediation: Ensure Function App Deployment Slot is using the latest version of TLS encryption
title: Beta - Function App Deployment Slot Not Using Latest TLS Encryption Version

remediation: Make sure that for PosgreSQL, the 'Enforce SSL connection' is set to 'ENABLED'
title: SSL Enforce Disabled

remediation: Kubernets Clusters should register 'audit logs' for analysis following security events
title: Beta - AKS Without Audit Logs

remediation: Virtual machine resources should set a managed disk for encryption, resilience and reduction of costs
title: Beta - VM Without Managed Disk

remediation: All 'azurerm_storage_account' resources should define a 'delete_retention_policy' block for their 'blob_properties' to allow data recovery
title: Beta - Blob Storage Without Soft Delete

remediation: Resources of type 'azurerm_databricks_workspace' should use a custom virtual network
title: Beta - Databricks Workspace Using Default Virtual Network

remediation: All 'azurerm_mssql_database' resources should enable data encryption at rest through the 'transparent_data_encryption_enabled' field
title: Beta - SQL Database Without Data Encryption

remediation: Make sure that for PostgreSQL Database, server parameter 'log_disconnections' is set to 'ON'
title: PostgreSQL Log Disconnections Not Set

remediation: MariaDB Server Geo-redundant Backup should be enabled
title: MariaDB Server Geo-redundant Backup Disabled

remediation: No 'azurerm_recovery_services_vault' resource should set 'immutability' to 'Disabled'. By locking the setting, malicious actors are prevented from disabling the setting and deleting backups.
title: Beta - Recovery Services Vault Without Immutability

remediation: Ensure that logging for Azure Databricks is 'Enabled' for categories: 'accounts','Filesystem','clusters','notebook' and 'jobs', with one or more of the following destinations: 'Azure Log Analytics workspace', 'Azure Storage Account', 'Azure Event Hubs'
title: Beta - Databricks Diagnostic Logging Not Configured

remediation: Resources of type 'azurerm_storage_account' should have a 'azurerm_management_lock' associated with them to prevent users from accidentally or maliciously deleting a storage account
title: Beta - Storage Account Without Delete Lock

remediation: App Service Slot should have managed identity enabled
title: Beta - App Service Slot Managed Identity Disabled

remediation: Web app should only accept HTTPS traffic in Azure Web App Service.
title: Web App Accepting Traffic Other Than HTTPS

remediation: There should be a 'azurerm_monitor_activity_log_alert' resource configured to capture 'create or update SQL server firewall rule' events
title: Beta - Activity Log Alert For Create or Update SQL Server Firewall Rule Not Configured

remediation: Storage Accounts should enforce the use of HTTPS
title: Storage Account Not Forcing HTTPS

remediation: All 'azurerm_storage_account' resources should define a 'container_delete_retention_policy' block for their 'blob_properties' to allow data recovery
title: Beta - Containers Without Soft Delete

remediation: Make sure that for PostgreSQL Database, server parameter 'log_duration' is set to 'ON'
title: PostgreSQL Log Duration Not Set

remediation: Storage Account should not be public to grant the principle of least privileges
title: Public Storage Account

remediation: Windows based VMs should enabled automatic updates
title: Beta - VM With Automatic Updates Disabled

remediation: There should be a 'azurerm_monitor_activity_log_alert' resource configured to capture 'create or update network security group' events
title: Beta - Activity Log Alert For Create Or Update Network Security Group Not Configured

remediation: All 'azurerm_monitor_diagnostic_setting' resources should have logging for all main categories: 'Administrative', 'Alert', 'Policy', and 'Security' enabled
title: Beta - Diagnostic Settings Without Appropriate Logging

remediation: Ensure MSSQL is using the latest version of TLS encryption
title: Beta - MSSQL Not Using Latest TLS Encryption Version

remediation: All 'azurerm_storage_account' resources should exclusively use 'AES-256-GCM' for channel encryption
title: Beta - Storage Account Using Unsafe SMB Channel Encryption

remediation: Check if all IPs are allowed, check from start 0.0.0.0 to end 255.255.255.255.
title: SQLServer Ingress From Any IP

remediation: All Alerts should be enabled in MSSQL Database Server SecurityAlerts Policy Properties
title: MSSQL Server Database With Alerts Disabled

remediation: Check if PostgreSQL Database Server retains logs for less than 3 Days
title: Small PostgreSQL DB Server Log Retention Period

remediation: Azure SQL Server's Admin account login must avoid using names like 'Admin', that are too predictable, which means the attribute 'administrator_login' must be set to a name that is not easy to predict
title: SQL Server Predictable Admin Account Name

remediation: Ensure that Connection Throttling is set for the PostgreSQL server
title: PostgreSQL Server Without Connection Throttling

remediation: Ensure that Activity Log Retention is set 365 days or greater
title: Small Activity Log Retention Period

remediation: Check if Web Application Firewall is disabled or not configured for Azure's Application Gateway.
title: WAF Is Disabled For Azure Application Gateway

remediation: VM resources should enable encryption at host for improved data security
title: Beta - VM Without Encryption At Host

remediation: Security Contact Email should be defined
title: Security Contact Email

remediation: Make sure that for Postgre SQL Database Server, parameter 'log_checkpoints' is set to 'ON'
title: PostgreSQL Log Checkpoints Disabled

remediation: Ensure that logging for Azure KeyVault is 'Enabled'
title: Vault Auditing Disabled

remediation: Azure Storage Table should not allow all ACL (Access Control List) permissions - r (read), w (write), d (delete), and l (list).
title: Storage Table Allows All ACL Permissions

remediation: Port 22 (SSH) is exposed to the internet
title: SSH Is Exposed To The Internet

remediation: Role Definition should not allow custom role creation (Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/write)
title: Role Definition Allows Custom Role Creation

remediation: The 'azurerm_databricks_workspace' resource should enable CMK encryption
title: Beta - Databricks Workspace Without CMK

remediation: Unnecessary assignements increase the likelihood of privilege escalation and unauthorized access.
title: Beta - Use Of User Access Administrator Role Is Not Restricted

remediation: Network Interfaces IP Forwarding should be disabled
title: Network Interfaces IP Forwarding Enabled

remediation: Azure Container Service (AKS) should use Azure Policies Add-On
title: AKS Uses Azure Policies Add-On Disabled

remediation: All 'azurerm_storage_account' resources should disable access key via 'Shared Key' for improved access control
title: Beta - Storage Account With Shared Access Key

remediation: Ensure Function App is using the latest version of TLS encryption
title: Function App Not Using Latest TLS Encryption Version

remediation: Public Network Access should be disabled for Azure Cognitive Search
title: Azure Cognitive Search Public Network Access Enabled

remediation: Make sure that for all keys the expiration date is set
title: Key Expiration Not Set

remediation: Firewall rule allowing unrestricted access to Redis from other Azure sources
title: Redis Publicly Accessible

remediation: No resource of type 'azurerm_storage_account' should set 'cross_tenant_replication_enabled' to true, this increases risk of unauthorized data access
title: Beta - Storage Account With Cross Tenant Replication Enabled

remediation: Resources that support diagnostic settings should be associated with a 'azurerm_monitor_diagnostic_setting' resource for exporting activity logs
title: Beta - Resource Without Diagnostic Settings

remediation: App Service should have 'http2_enabled' enabled
title: App Service HTTP2 Disabled

remediation: Trusted Microsoft Services should be enabled for Storage Account access
title: Trusted Microsoft Services Not Enabled

remediation: All 'azurerm_storage_account' resources should define a 'retention_policy' block for their 'share_properties' to allow data recovery
title: Beta - File Share Without Soft Delete

remediation: SQL Server alert email should be enabled
title: SQL Server Alert Email Disabled

remediation: Cosmos DB Account must have a mapping of tags.
title: Cosmos DB Account Without Tags

remediation: A sensitive port, such as port 23 or port 110, is open for the whole network in either TCP or UDP protocol
title: Sensitive Port Is Exposed To Entire Network

remediation: Virtual machine resources should disable extension_operations since they can provide administrative privileges to processes
title: Beta - VM With Extension Operations Enabled

remediation: Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) API should not be exposed to the internet
title: AKS Private Cluster Disabled

remediation: Make sure for SQL Servers that Auditing Retention is greater than 90 days
title: Small MSSQL Server Audit Retention

remediation: Azure Virtual Network subnet must be configured with a Network Security Group, which means the attribute 'security_group' must be defined and not empty
title: Security Group is Not Configured

remediation: Azure Storage Share should not allow all ACL (Access Control List) permissions - r (read), w (write), d (delete), and l (list).
title: Storage Share Allows All ACL Permissions

remediation: Make sure that for MSSQL Servers, 'Auditing' is set to 'On'
title: MSSQL Server Auditing Disabled

remediation: Check if the Kubernetes Dashboard is enabled.
title: Dashboard Is Enabled

remediation: All 'azurerm_storage_account' resources should use the latest SMB protocol version to prevent exploitation of known vulnerabilities
title: Beta - Storage Account Not Using Latest SMB Protocol Version

remediation: There should be a 'azurerm_monitor_activity_log_alert' resource configured to capture 'delete network security group' events
title: Beta - Activity Log Alert For Delete Network Security Group Not Configured

remediation: PostgreSQL Server Infrastructure Encryption should be enabled
title: PostgreSQL Server Infrastructure Encryption Disabled

remediation: Using disk encryption on managed disks data improves confidentiality, compliance, and control over encryption keys, ensuring sensitive information at rest is protected against unauthorized access
title: Beta - Disk Encryption On Managed Disk Disabled

remediation: Ensuring container instances use private vNets reduces public exposure and limits potential security risks.
title: Beta - Container Instances Not Using Private Virtual Networks

remediation: Make sure that for MySQL Database Server, 'Enforce SSL connection' is enabled
title: MySQL SSL Connection Disabled

remediation: Flow logs enable capturing information about IP traffic flowing in and out of the network security groups. Network Security Group Flow Logs must be enabled with retention period greater than or equal to 90 days. This is important, because these logs are used to check for anomalies and give information of suspected breaches
title: Small Flow Logs Retention Period

remediation: Azure Container Registry resources should only have 'read' permissions
title: Beta - Azure Container Registry With Broad Permissions

remediation: No 'azurerm_data_protection_backup_vault' resource should set 'immutability' to 'Disabled'. By locking the setting, malicious actors are prevented from disabling the setting and deleting backups.
title: Beta - Backup Vault Without Immutability

remediation: MariaDB Server Public Network Access should be disabled
title: MariaDB Server Public Network Access Enabled

remediation: Logic Apps should have managed identity enabled
title: Beta - Logic App Managed Identity Disabled

remediation: Make sure that the 'Standard' pricing tiers were selected.
title: Security Center Pricing Tier Is Not Standard

remediation: Ensure Storage Account is using the latest version of TLS encryption
title: Storage Account Not Using Latest TLS Encryption Version

remediation: Container Apps should have managed identity enabled
title: Beta - Container App Managed Identity Disabled

remediation: Azure Front Door WAF should be enabled
title: Azure Front Door WAF Disabled

remediation: Ensure that 'Threat Detection' is enabled for Azure SQL Database
title: SQL Database Audit Disabled

remediation: There should be a 'azurerm_monitor_activity_log_alert' resource configured to capture 'create or update security solution' events
title: Beta - Activity Log Alert For Create or Update Security Solution Not Configured

remediation: Azure App Service should only enforce FTPS when 'ftps_state' is enabled
title: App Service FTPS Enforce Disabled

remediation: Azure Container Service (AKS) instance should have role-based access control (RBAC) enabled
title: AKS RBAC Disabled

remediation: Critical services that support logging through a 'azurerm_monitor_diagnostic_setting' resource should be associated with one
title: Beta - Service Without Resource Logging

remediation: Make sure that on PostgreSQL Geo Redundant Backups is enabled
title: Geo Redundancy Is Disabled

remediation: There should be a 'azurerm_monitor_activity_log_alert' resource configured to capture 'delete SQL server firewall rule' events
title: Beta - Activity Log Alert For Delete SQL Server Firewall Rule Not Configured

remediation: No 'azurerm_data_protection_backup_vault' resource should set 'soft_delete' to off, this makes it impossible to recover backup data
title: Beta - Backup Vault Without Soft Delete

remediation: Role Assignment should limit guest user permissions
title: Role Assignment Not Limit Guest User Permissions

remediation: Periodically newer versions are released for PHP software either due to security flaws or to include additional functionality. Using the latest PHP version for web apps is recommended in order to take advantage of security fixes, if any, and/or additional functionalities of the newer version.
title: App Service Without Latest PHP Version

title: Beta - Activity Log Alert For Create or Update Public IP Address Rule Not Configured

remediation: Kubernetes Clusters should have managed identity enabled
title: Beta - Kubernetes Cluster Managed Identity Disabled

title: Function App Client Certificates Unrequired

title: Beta - Storage Account Without CMK

remediation: Make sure that for MSSQL Server, the Auditing Retention is greater than 90 days

remediation: Azure Function App should only enforce FTPS when 'ftps_state' is enabled
title: Function App FTPS Enforce Disabled

remediation: Make sure that alerts notifications are set to 'On' in the Azure Security Center Contact
title: Email Alerts Disabled

remediation: Ensure PostgreSQL is using the latest version of TLS encryption
title: Beta - PostgreSQL Not Using Latest TLS Encryption Version

remediation: Azurerm Container Registry should contain associated locks, which means 'azurerm_management_lock.scope' should be associated with 'azurerm_container_registry'
title: Azure Container Registry With No Locks

remediation: Azure Active Directory must be used for authentication for Service Fabric
title: Azure Active Directory Authentication

title: AD Admin Not Configured For SQL Server

remediation: Default Azure Storage Account network access should be set to Deny
title: Default Azure Storage Account Network Access Is Too Permissive

remediation: All linux based virtual machines should set SSH keys for enchanced security
title: Beta - VM Without Admin SSH Public Key Set

remediation: There should be a 'azurerm_monitor_activity_log_alert' resource configured to capture delete policy assignment events
title: Beta - Activity Log Alert For Delete Policy Assignment Not Configured

remediation: Azure App Service client certificate should be enabled
title: Azure App Service Client Certificate Disabled

title: Firewall Rule Allows Too Many Hosts To Access Redis Cache

remediation: Ensure that the encryption is active on the disk
title: Encryption On Managed Disk Disabled

remediation: Function App should have 'http2_enabled' enabled
title: Function App HTTP2 Disabled

remediation: MSSQL Server public network access should be disabled
title: MSSQL Server Public Network Access Enabled

remediation: Azure Container Service (AKS) should use Disk Encryption Set ID in supported types of disk
title: AKS Disk Encryption Set ID Undefined

title: Beta - Recovery Services Vault Without Soft Delete

remediation: There should be a 'azurerm_monitor_activity_log_alert' resource configured to capture 'delete public ip address rule' events
title: Beta - Activity Log Alert For Delete Public IP Address Rule Not Configured

title: Virtual Network with DDoS Protection Plan disabled

title: App Service Managed Identity Disabled

title: App Service Not Using Latest TLS Encryption Version

title: Admin User Enabled For Container Registry

title: Network Watcher Flow Disabled

remediation: Redis Cache is not configured to be updated regularly with security and operational updates
title: Redis Not Updated Regularly

remediation: There should be a 'azurerm_monitor_activity_log_alert' resource configured to capture 'delete security solution' events
title: Beta - Activity Log Alert For Delete Security Solution Not Configured

remediation: No Network Security Group is attached to the Virtual Machine
title: VM Not Attached To Network

remediation: Azure SQL Server must avoid using predictable Active Directory Administrator Account names, like 'Admin', which means the attribute 'login' must be set to a name that is not easy to predict
title: SQL Server Predictable Active Directory Account Name

remediation: Network Interfaces should not be exposed with a public IP address. If configured, additional security baselines should be followed (https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/security/benchmark/azure/baselines/virtual-network-security-baseline, https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/security/benchmark/azure/baselines/public-ip-security-baseline)
title: Network Interfaces With Public IP

remediation: The IP range filter should be defined to secure the data stored
title: CosmosDB Account IP Range Filter Not Set

remediation: PostgreSQL Server Threat Detection Policy should be enabled
title: PostgreSQL Server Threat Detection Policy Disabled

remediation: Make sure that for PostgreSQL Database, server parameter 'log_connections' is set to 'ON'
title: PostgreSQL Log Connections Not Set

remediation: A sensitive port, such as port 23 or port 110, is open for wide private network in either TCP or UDP protocol
title: Sensitive Port Is Exposed To Wide Private Network

remediation: Azure App Service authentication settings should be enabled
title: App Service Authentication Disabled

remediation: Azure Function App should have managed identity enabled
title: Function App Managed Identity Disabled

remediation: Periodically, newer versions are released for Python software either due to security flaws or to include additional functionality. Using the latest full Python version for web apps is recommended in order to take advantage of security fixes, if any, and/or additional functionalities of the newer version.
title: App Service Without Latest Python Version

remediation: Deleting an Azure Key Vault without purge protection enabled can cause permanent loss of keys, secrets, and certificates, leading to unrecoverable data loss and disruption of dependent services.
title: Beta - Key Vault Purge Protection Is Enabled

remediation: There should be a 'azurerm_monitor_activity_log_alert' resource configured to capture create policy assignment events
title: Beta - Activity Log Alert For Create Policy Assignment Not Configured

remediation: All 'azurerm_recovery_services_vault' resources should set 'public_network_access_enabled' to false in order to prevent exposure to the internet and reduce the risk of unauthorized access
title: Beta - Recovery Services Vault With Public Network Access

remediation: Without a System Assigned identity, the Redis instance cannot use Entra ID for secure RBAC access, increasing the risk of credential exposure or overly permissive access.
title: Beta - Redis Cache Managed Identity Is Not Set To System Assigned

remediation: Azure SQL Server Accessibility should be set to a minimal address range to grant the principle of least privileges, which means the difference between the values of the 'end_ip_address' and 'start_ip_address' must be less than 256. Additionally, both ips must be different from '0.0.0.0'.
title: Unrestricted SQL Server Access

remediation: Azure Instances should use SSH Key instead of basic authentication
title: Azure Instance Using Basic Authentication

remediation: Anonymous, public read access to a container and its blobs are enabled in Azure Blob Storage
title: Storage Container Is Publicly Accessible

remediation: Make sure that for all secrets the expiration date is set
title: Secret Expiration Not Set

remediation: Ensure Redis Cache is using the latest version of TLS encryption
title: Beta - Redis Cache Not Using Latest TLS Encryption Version

remediation: Redis Cache resources should not allow non-SSL connections
title: Redis Cache Allows Non SSL Connections

remediation: Azure Function App authentication settings should be enabled
title: Function App Authentication Disabled

remediation: A sensitive port, such as port 23 or port 110, is open for small public network in either TCP or UDP protocol
title: Sensitive Port Is Exposed To Small Public Network

remediation: Port 3389 (Remote Desktop) is exposed to the internet
title: RDP Is Exposed To The Internet

remediation: MySQL Server public access should be disabled
title: MySQL Server Public Access Enabled

remediation: Azure Kubernetes Service should have the proper network policy configuration to ensure the principle of least privileges, which means that 'network_profile.network_policy' should be defined
title: AKS Network Policy Misconfigured

remediation: There should be a 'azurerm_monitor_activity_log_alert' resource configured to capture service health events
title: Beta - Activity Log Alert For Service Health Not Configured

remediation: Make sure that for SQL Servers, 'Auditing' is set to 'On'
title: SQL Server Auditing Disabled

remediation: Key Vault Secrets should have set Content Type
title: Key Vault Secrets Content Type Undefined

remediation: Key Vaults should set key type to one that uses HSM for added security
title: Beta - Key Vault Without HSM Protection

remediation: Firewall rule allowing unrestricted access to Redis from the Internet
title: Redis Entirely Accessible

remediation: Make sure that for PostgreSQL Database, server parameter 'log_retention' is set to 'ON'
title: Log Retention Is Not Set
